items.title: Designing a Multi-Agent System for Engineering Support at Scale: A Case Study From Grab
items.summaryShort: Designing a Multi-Agent System for Engineering Support at Scale: A Case Study From Grab. Grab’s Central Data Team built a multi-agent AI system to automate repetitive engineering support tasks across its data warehouse platform.

items.title: Presentation: The AI Gateway: Scaling Centralized Inference Across Decentralized Teams
items.summaryShort: Presentation: The AI Gateway: Scaling Centralized Inference Across Decentralized Teams. Meryem Arik discusses why modern engineering teams face "inference chaos" and how AI model gateways provide a critical control layer.

items.title: OpenAI Outlines WebRTC Architecture for Low-Latency Voice AI at Scale
items.summaryShort: OpenAI Outlines WebRTC Architecture for Low-Latency Voice AI at Scale. OpenAI recently outlined how it adapted WebRTC for low-latency voice AI at global scale.

items.title: Pip 26.1 Ships Dependency Cooldowns and Experimental Lockfile Support to Combat Supply Chain Attacks
items.summaryShort: Pip 26.1 Ships Dependency Cooldowns and Experimental Lockfile Support to Combat Supply Chain Attacks. Pip 26.1 ships dependency cooldowns that enforce a waiting period before newly published packages can be installed, and experimental pyloc

items.title: Anthropic Introduces MCP Tunnels for Private Agent Access to Internal Systems
items.summaryShort: Anthropic Introduces MCP Tunnels for Private Agent Access to Internal Systems. Anthropic has expanded its Claude Managed Agents platform with two enterprise-focused capabilities: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels.

items.title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
items.summaryShort: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information. Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses, but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said th

items.title: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI
items.summaryShort: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI. In a memo to employees, CEO Sasan Goodarzi said the layoffs are meant to reduce complexity, simplify the company's corporate structure, and deliver better AI products.

items.title: AI search startups are blowing up
items.summaryShort: AI search startups are blowing up. AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.
